design_philosophy: Apple simplicity, Airbnb friendliness, Stripe quality. Warm, trustworthy, clean, un-cluttered. Never robotic or heavily 'stock'. Mobile-first, excellent typography and generous breathing room.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(37,99,235,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A192F] border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:border-[#CBD5E1] hover:bg-[#F8FAFC] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#E6F8F3] text-[#0284C7] hover:bg-[#D1FAE5] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium
buttons.emergency: bg-[#EF4444] text-white hover:bg-[#DC2626] transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 border border-[#F1F5F9]
cards.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-2xl

header.layout: Sticky header (z-50). Top thin banner for emergency/hours. Main header below with logo (left), nav links (center), Call/Book CTAs (right).

hero.layout: Asymmetrical 2-column or fluid grid. Left: H1, subtext, dual CTAs, trust badges row (Google stars, CDCP accepted). Right: Large main image with absolute positioned floating cards (e.g. '4.9/5 Google Reviews').
hero.styling: Generous top padding to account for sticky header. Minimal background, let typography shine.

social_proof.layout: Horizontal marquee or grid of testimonial cards.
social_proof.styling: Use soft shadow cards. Star ratings in yellow (#F59E0B). Include simple avatar placeholders or initials.

why_choose_us.styling: Cards with large Phosphor Duotone icons. Backgrounds mostly white, maybe one in highlight_mint. Clean spacing.

meet_dentist.layout: 2 columns. Left: Large premium photo of Dr. Raju Sarna with rounded-3xl corners. Right: Bio, credentials list, signature.
meet_dentist.styling: Background light grey (#F8FAFC) to separate from white sections.

services_grid.styling: Clean 'Stripe-like' cards. Icon, title, short description. Hover states add a subtle border or mint/blue background tint. No heavy dropshadows.

technology.layout: Alternating text/image layout or bento grid showcasing tech (3D CBCT, lasers).
technology.styling: Images must have rounded-3xl borders. Clean sans-serif labels.

smile_gallery.layout: Side-by-side Before/After cards or simple grid.
smile_gallery.styling: Images need to be consistent in size and aspect ratio (e.g., aspect-square or 4/3).

patient_journey.layout: Horizontal timeline (4 steps). Vertical on mobile.
patient_journey.styling: Connecting lines should be dashed or subtle gray. Nodes should be primary color or highlight_mint.

insurance.layout: Centered text, logo grid for insurance companies + CDCP banner.
insurance.styling: Trust-building. Soft green accents for 'Accepted' checks.

faq.layout: Narrow container (max-w-3xl) for readability. Shadcn Accordion.
faq.styling: Clean bottom borders, no surrounding card boxes. Smooth expansion animation.

footer.layout: 4 columns on desktop. Brand, Links, Services, Contact.
footer.styling: Deep Navy background (#0A192F). White text for headings, text-gray-400 for links. Professional, high contrast.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast compliance. Text on highlight_mint must be dark (Primary or Accent).
accessibility_and_testing.animations: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Use smooth opacity/transform transitions, no aggressive bouncing.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, accordion triggers MUST include a descriptive `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case).

motion_guidelines.hover: Scale up images slightly inside containers (overflow-hidden). Lift cards by -2px or -4px on hover.
motion_guidelines.reveal: Use staggered fade-in up for grid items using Framer Motion (opacity 0 -> 1, y 20 -> 0).
